name: Insurance AI Bias Attestation
outcome: Gated two-step chain for Colorado SB 21-169 / Reg. 10-1-1 annual bias attestation for insurance AI models. Step 1 tests BIFSG proxy bias thresholds (art-239) from aggregate regression outputs (ZERO PII). Gate: bias_detected=true proceeds to NAIC AIS readiness assessment (art-240) for remediation planning. When bias is not detected, chain terminates (annual attestation evidence is the execution_hash anchored at anchor.ainumbers.co/mcp). Step 2 (art-240) scores insurance AI program readiness across 6 NAIC AIS dimensions and produces exam-ready gap list.
